zh.lifeSummary: Agnes Bereford是William Bereford和Margery du Plessis的女兒，於1300年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾維曉。她於1317年4月之前與John de Argentine結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1375年7月18日在英國英格蘭多瑟特萊謝特 馬特拉維斯享年75歲，埋葬在英國倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Bereford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in the parish of Alstonfield, Staffordshire named Beresford, from Old English beofor ‘beaver’ (or possibly from a byname from this word) + Old English ford ‘ford’. This name also became established in Ireland.

History: The first recorded bearer of the surname is John de Beveresford, who held the manor of Beresford, Staffordshire, from c. 1220 to 1241. All present-day Beresfords are apparently descended from Thomas Beresford, who fought at Agincourt in 1415 and who fathered sixteen sons and five daughters. The Irish branch of the family includes the Marquesses of Waterford.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: Agnes Bereford was born in 1300, in Wishaw, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of William Bereford and Margery du Plessis. She married John de Argentine before April 1317. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 18 July 1375, in Lytchett Matravers, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 75, and was buried in London, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Agnes Bereford est née en 1300, à Wishaw, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de William Bereford et Margery du Plessis. Elle a épousé John de Argentine avant avril 1317. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 18 juillet 1375, à Lytchett Matravers, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterrée à Londres, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Berefordは1300年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアウィショーでWilliam BerefordとMargery du Plessisの娘として生まれた。1317年4月以前にJohn de Argentineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1375年7月18日にイギリスイギリスドールセトリトチェット マトラバーズで75歳で死去し，イギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Bereford(은)는 1300년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 와이쇼에서 William Bereford(와)과 Margery du Plessis의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1317년 4월 이전 John de Argentine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1375년 7월 18일 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 리트쳇 마트레이버스에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Agnes Bereford nasceu em 1300, em Wishaw, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de William Bereford e Margery du Plessis. Ela casou-se com John de Argentine antes abril de 1317. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 18 de julho de 1375, em Lytchett Matravers, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 75 anos, e foi sepultada em London, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Agnes Bereford родилась в 1300 г. в местности вишав, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали William Bereford и Margery du Plessis. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Argentine перед апрель 1317 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 18 июля 1375 г. в местности личетт матравирс, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 75 лет и была похоронена в местности Лондон, Англия.
